message:
fix(abi): eliminate unsafe stdin access in wscanf/vwscanf via stdin_stream_id()

Add a const fn stdin_stream_id() helper to stdio_abi that returns the
STDIN_SENTINEL value without requiring an unsafe block to read the
mutable static `stdin` pointer. Update wscanf and vwscanf in wchar_abi
to use this safe accessor, removing two unnecessary unsafe accesses to
the global stdin symbol.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
